exploration_notes: Created pkg/policy/audit_logger.go with PolicyAuditLogger struct and pkg/policy/audit_logger_test.go with comprehensive tests. The implementation follows Cilium patterns: uses lock.Mutex for thread safety, logfields constants for structured logging, the package-level scoped 'log' variable (from config.go), api.Decision for verdicts, and policyTypes.Key for policy key representation. LogDecision records identity/policy/verdict decisions; LogEvaluation records detailed evaluation context including
